Package org.eventb.core.pog

Class POGIntervalSelectionHint

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.pog.POGIntervalSelectionHint
All Implemented Interfaces:
IPOGHint
class POGIntervalSelectionHint extends Object implements IPOGHint
An interval selection hint specifies a sequence of predicate sets.

  • Constructor Details

    • POGIntervalSelectionHint

      POGIntervalSelectionHint(IPOPredicateSet start, IPOPredicateSet end)
      Creates an interval selection hint.
      Parameters:
      start - the predicate set immediately preceding the interval
      end - the last predicate set in the interval

  • Method Details

    • getEnd

      public IPOPredicateSet getEnd()
      Returns the last predicate set in the interval.
      Returns:
      the last predicate set in the interval

    • getStart

      public IPOPredicateSet getStart()
      Returns the predicate set immediately preceding the interval.
      Returns:
      the predicate set immediately preceding the interval

    • create

      public void create(IPOSequent sequent, String name, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Description copied from interface: IPOGHint
      Creates a representation of this hint in the database.
      Specified by:
      create in interface IPOGHint
      Parameters:
      sequent - the proof obligation to which this hint is to be attached
      name - ignored parameter
      monitor - a progress monitor, or null if progress reporting is not desired
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if there was a problem accessing the database, or if the POG hint is not valid
